title: Record number of travellers’ phones, electronic devices being searched at U.S. border amid Trump’s immigration crackdown – Featured Article in the Toronto Star - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Record number of travellers’ phones, electronic devices being searched at U.S. border amid Trump’s immigration crackdown – Featured Article in the Toronto Star
Managing Partner, Evan Green shared his insights with the Toronto Star on the growing number of electronic device searches at the U.S. border, noting the heightened scrutiny Canadians can expect under stricter immigration policies and emphasizing the importance of preparedness when traveling.

#### Evan J. Green LL.B., C.S.
